TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_mipitulikan_ni_Yuku_Tipus_Sayun-micalap_tu_bangbangan, title = mipitulikan_ni_Yuku_Tipus_Sayun-micalap_tu_bangbangan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/mipitulikan_ni_Yuku_Tipus_Sayun-micalap_tu_bangbangan} }

S.FORM: micalap tu bangbangan. Milakalak Kan muliyaw pacakad misaicelang mauzip. yu lasubu abinabinaaytu amhcaan itawayhe cabesiwhan amin nababalakian nita Kuni debngngan nu ada atu kukung. milakec awas hacacacayentuisasa' aynu lala'amin wizaymin masazazaantu kumapatayay,nababalaki,ahicaennaca. tumayduba'
S.PHON: mi ¶ar~…ĺap tu baŇčbaŇčan. mir~…ĺakar~…ĺak kan mur~…ĺijaw pa ¶akad misai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč mauzip. ju r~…ĺasubu abinabinaajtu amńß ¶aan itawajńß…ô ¶ab…ôsiwńßan amin nababar~…ĺakian nita kuni d…ôbŇčŇčan nu ada atu kukuŇč. mir~…ĺak…ô ¶ awas ńßa ¶a ¶a ¶aj…ôntuisasa Ē~ ° ajnu r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °amin wizajmin masazazaantu kumapatajaj,nababar~…ĺaki,ańßi ¶a…ônna ¶a. tumajduba Ē~ °
S.FORM: micalap tu bangbangan. Milakalak Kan muliyaw pacakad misaicelang mauzip. yu lasubu abinabinaaytu amhcaan itawayhe cabesiwhan amin nababalakian nita Kuni debngngan nu ada atu kukung. milakec awas hacacacayentuisasa' aynu lala'amin wizaymin masazazaantu kumapatayay,nababalaki,ahicaennaca. tumayduba'
